OPPOSITION OF SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION AND REQUEST FOR ATTY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGUIRE, DENNIS VINCENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE; REQUESTS FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT $5,160 OR AS SET BY COURT (CCP 425.16). THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GEORGETTE BROWN, THE SALVATION ARMY AND THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE; REQUESTS FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT $5,160 OR AS SET BY COURT (CCP 425.16) IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF'S THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION ARISES AT LEAST IN PART, FROM THE PROTECTED ACTIVITY OF INSTITUTING LEGAL PROCEEDINGS, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED ANY ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE THAT COULD AVOID DEFENDANT'S ASSERTION OF THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,225.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT (AS MODIFIED). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, COURT REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR # 11216.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. DEFENDANTS GEORGETTE BROWN, THE SALVATION ARMY AND THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S MOTION FOR: 1) JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS; 2) SUMMARY JUDGMENT; 3) OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is off calendar. On December 21, 2011, the court granted terminating sanctions and the Complaint was dismissed, with prejudice. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Mtn For Order Imposing Termination Sanctions; Req For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Neil P. Cherubin, Esq., from Low, Ball & Lynch, 415-981-6630, for Defendants and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS GEORGETTE BROWN, THE SALVATION ARMY AND THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S Motion For Order Imposing Termination Sanctions is Granted. The Court dismisses the Complaint with prejudice. Plaintiff is ordered to pay Defendants $880 in sanctions within 15 days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, not Reported.

Notice Of Motion To Strike; Requests For Costs And Attorney'S Fees In The Amount $5,160 Or As Set By Court (Ccp 425.16)
Off Calendar Jul-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Neil P. Cherubin, Esq., Low, Ball & Lynch, 415-991-6630, for defendant and moving party

NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS GEORGETTE BROWN, THE SALVATION ARMY AND THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S Notice Of Motion To Strike; Requests For Costs And Attorney'S Fees In The Amount $5,160 Or As Set By Court (Ccp 425.16) is Granted. Defendant has shown that Plaintiff's Third Cause of Action arises at least in part, from the protected activity of instituting legal proceedings, and Plaintiff has not presented any admissible evidence that could avoid Defendant's assertion of the litigation privilege. Defendant is awarded fees in the amount of $3,225.00. Order signed in open court (as modified). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR # 11216. (301/PJB)
